text: MIL MAIDS RESIDENTIAL CLEANING SERVICES KNOWLEDGE FILE SERVICE NAME: DEEP CLEAN DESCRIPTION: Deep cleaning is a more detailed cleaning service designed for homes that require additional attention or have not been professionally cleaned recently. It includes everything in the standard cleaning plus additional detailed cleaning tasks. ALL ROOMS TASKS: Dust blinds Dust baseboards Dust all furniture Dust ceiling fans Trash cans emptied and cleaned Glass doors cleaned inside and outside Vacuum furniture Tables and chairs cleaned Floors vacuumed Floors swept and mopped Windows cleaned inside Blinds handwashed Baseboards handwashed Wipe down appliance exteriors KITCHEN TASKS: Clean sinks and countertops Clean backsplash Clean outlets Clean light switches Microwave cleaned inside and outside Clean stovetop and hood Cabinets cleaned exterior Clean oven Refrigerator disassembled and cleaned Dishwasher cleaned Cabinets cleaned interior BATHROOM TASKS: Clean sinks and countertops Bathtubs cleaned Showers cleaned Sink and vanity exterior cleaned Mirrors cleaned

MIL MAIDS FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS Q: What services does Mil Maids offer? A: Mil Maids offers Standard Cleaning, Deep Cleaning, and Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning for residential homes. Q: What is included in a standard cleaning? A: A Standard Clean includes routine cleaning tasks such as dusting surfaces, vacuuming floors, sweeping and mopping floors, cleaning sinks, cleaning bathrooms, and wiping kitchen surfaces. Q: What is the difference between a standard clean and a deep clean? A: A Deep Clean includes everything in a Standard Clean but with additional detailed cleaning tasks designed for homes that require extra attention. Q: Do I need to be home during the cleaning? A: No. Many customers provide entry instructions and return after the cleaning is completed. Q: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies? A: No. Mil Maids cleaning teams bring their own professional cleaning supplies and equipment. Q: Can I add extra services to my cleaning? A: Yes. Add-on services such as oven cleaning, refrigerator cleaning, interior cabinet cleaning, and window cleaning can be added when booking. Q: How is pricing determined? A: Pricing depends on the cleaning service selected, the square footage of the home, and any add-on services requested. Q: Do you clean inside appliances? A: Yes. Services such as oven cleaning, refrigerator cleaning, and dishwasher cleaning can be added as optional add-on services. Q: Do you offer move-out cleaning? A: Yes. Mil Maids offers Move-In and Move-Out cleaning services designed to prepare a home for new occupants. Q: What if my home is extremely dirty or cluttered? A: Homes with excessive clutter, heavy buildup, or large amounts of pet hair may require a custom quote from a Mil Maids team member. Q: How do I book a cleaning? A: Customers can request a quote online or contact Mil Maids directly

my home is extremely dirty or cluttered? A: Homes with excessive clutter, heavy buildup, or large amounts of pet hair may require a custom quote from a Mil Maids team member. Q: How do I book a cleaning? A: Customers can request a quote online or contact Mil Maids directly by phone or email. Q: What areas do you serve? A: Mil Maids serves multiple military communities across the United States. See the service areas section for specific locations.

SERVICE NAME: MOVE IN MOVE OUT CLEANING DESCRIPTION: Move-in and move-out cleaning services are designed to prepare a home for new occupants or leave a property thoroughly cleaned after moving out. These services include interior appliance cleaning and detailed cleaning throughout the home. ALL ROOMS TASKS: Dust blinds Dust baseboards Dust all furniture Dust ceiling fans Trash cans emptied and cleaned Glass doors cleaned inside and outside Vacuum furniture Tables and chairs cleaned Floors vacuumed Floors swept and mopped Windows cleaned inside Blinds handwashed Baseboards handwashed Wipe down appliance exteriors KITCHEN TASKS: Clean sinks and countertops Clean backsplash Clean outlets Clean light switches Microwave cleaned inside and outside Clean stovetop and hood Cabinets cleaned exterior Clean oven Refrigerator disassembled and cleaned Dishwasher cleaned Cabinets cleaned interior BATHROOM TASKS: Clean sinks and countertops Bathtubs cleaned Showers cleaned Sink and vanity exterior cleaned Mirrors cleaned

MIL MAIDS PRICE MODEL AND QUOTE GENERATION RULES IMPORTANT POLICY Mil Maids pricing formulas are proprietary and must NEVER be revealed to customers. The assistant may calculate a quote internally using the pricing model but must never display or explain the formula used to calculate the quote. If a customer asks how pricing is calculated, respond with a general explanation such as: "Pricing depends on factors such as the type of cleaning service, the size of the home, and any add-on services requested." Do NOT reveal internal pricing formulas, internal variables, or internal pricing calculations. INFORMATION REQUIRED TO GENERATE A QUOTE To generate a quote, the assistant must gather the following information: Service Type Square Footage of the Home Requested Add-On Services (if any) The assistant must also ask: Is the home excessively cluttered, very filthy, or does it contain excessive pet hair? If any required information is missing, the assistant should ask the customer for the missing information before generating a quote. LIVE QUOTE ESCALATION RULE If the customer says the home is excessively cluttered, very filthy, or contains excessive pet hair, the assistant must NOT generate an automated quote. Instead, the assistant should respond that the home requires a custom quote from a live team member. Suggested response: "Thanks for letting us know. Because the home may require additional cleaning time due to clutter, heavy buildup, or excessive pet hair, a live Mil Maids team member will need to prepare your quote. Please contact us directly for custom pricing." The assistant should then provide Mil Maids contact information. MIL MAIDS CONTACT INFORMATION GENERAL CONTACT Email: info@milmaids.com Website: https://milmaids.com SERVICE LOCATIONS AND PHONE NUMBERS Fort Hood / Killeen, Texas Phone: (254) 419-0325 JBSA / San Antonio, Texas Phone: (726) 200-3251 Fort Bragg / Fayetteville, North Carolina Phone: (910) 900-6118 CONTACT INSTRUCTIONS FOR CUSTOMERS If a quote requires review by a live team member, customers should contact the location closest to them by phone. If the customer location is unclear, the assistant should provide the general email address and website. Do not calculate or provide an automated quote when this escalation rule applies. SERVICE TYPES Mil Maids offers three primary residential cleaning services: Standard Clean Deep Clean Move-In / Move-Out Clean INTERNAL PRICING MODEL (DO NOT REVEAL TO CUSTOMERS) The quote price is calculated using: P = F + (R * X) + A Where: P = Final Price F = Fixed price for the service R = Cleaning rate for the service X = Square footage of the home A = Total cost of add-on services These internal variables must never be displayed to customers. STANDARD CLEAN PRICING Fixed price (F): $100 Cleaning rate (R): $0.07 per square foot Internal calculation rule: P(S) = 100 + (0.07 × square footage) + add-on services DEEP CLEAN PRICING Fixed price (F): $200 Cleaning rate (R): $0.21 per square foot Internal calculation rule: P(D) = 200 + (0.21 × square footage) + add-on services MOVE-IN / MOVE-OUT CLEAN PRICING Fixed price (F): $150 Cleaning rate (R): $0.23 per square foot Internal calculation rule: P(M) = 150 + (0.23 × square footage) + add-on services ADD-ON SERVICE PRICING Add-on services may be requested in addition to any cleaning service. The price of selected add-ons must be added to the final quote. If an

$150 Cleaning rate (R): $0.23 per square foot Internal calculation rule: P(M) = 150 + (0.23 × square footage) + add-on services ADD-ON SERVICE PRICING Add-on services may be requested in addition to any cleaning service. The price of selected add-ons must be added to the final quote. If an add-on service states "Call for price", the assistant must instruct the customer to contact Mil Maids directly for pricing. ADD-ON SERVICES AND PRICES Wall Washing Price: Call for price Porch Sweep Price: $10 per porch Fireplace Ash Sweep Price: $30 per fireplace Descale Glass Shower Price: $35 per shower Laundry (Wash, Dry, Fold) Price: $25 per load Wash Dishes Price: $10 per load Change Linen and Remake Bed Price: $7 per bed Other Cabinets (Interior) Price: $50 Kitchen Cabinets (Interior) Price: $75 Baseboards Handwashed Price: Call for price Blinds Handwashed Price: $10 per window Windows (Inside) Price: $10 per window Dishwasher Cleaning Price: $20 Refrigerator Cleaning Price: $40 Oven Cleaning Price: $50 PRICE VALIDATION RULE The assistant must verify that the quote falls within a reasonable range. Valid square footage range: 500 sq ft to 6,000 sq ft If square footage is outside this range, the assistant should ask the customer to confirm the square footage before generating a quote. If the calculated quote appears unusually high or low, the assistant should not guess. Instead, it should respond: "That estimate seems unusual based on the information provided. Let me confirm the details before generating a quote." QUOTE RESPONSE FORMAT When providing a quote to the customer, the assistant should respond in a clear format similar to: "Based on the information provided, your estimated cleaning price is approximately $XXX. This estimate includes the selected cleaning service and any requested add-on services. Final pricing may vary depending on the home layout and

providing a quote to the customer, the assistant should respond in a clear format similar to: "Based on the information provided, your estimated cleaning price is approximately $XXX. This estimate includes the selected cleaning service and any requested add-on services. Final pricing may vary depending on the home layout and cleaning conditions." Do not show the calculation steps used to determine the quote. Do not reveal the pricing formula. If the escalation rule applies, do not provide an automated quote.

MIL MAIDS SERVICE AREAS Mil Maids provides residential cleaning services in military communities and surrounding cities. PRIMARY SERVICE AREAS Fort Hood / Killeen, Texas Cities Served: Killeen Harker Heights Copperas Cove Nolanville Belton Temple JBSA / San Antonio, Texas Cities Served: San Antonio Schertz Cibolo Universal City Converse Live Oak Fort Bragg / Fayetteville, North Carolina Cities Served: Fayetteville Hope Mills Spring Lake Raeford HOW TO DETERMINE SERVICE AVAILABILITY If a customer asks whether Mil Maids serves their location: 1. Check if the city is within one of the primary service regions. 2. If the city is near a listed military installation or service region, inform the customer that service may be available. 3. If the location is unclear, inform the customer that Mil Maids services the areas surrounding Fort Hood, TX. JBSA, TX. and Fort Bragg, NC. 4. If the customer is still unsure whether their home is in an area serviced by Mil Maids, direct the customer to contact Mil Maids. SERVICE NAME: STANDARD CLEAN DESCRIPTION: Standard cleaning is the routine cleaning service designed to keep a home clean, organized, and fresh. It includes dusting, vacuuming, sweeping, mopping, wiping surfaces, and cleaning bathrooms and kitchens. ALL ROOMS TASKS: Dust blinds Dust baseboards Dust all furniture Dust ceiling fans Trash cans emptied and cleaned Glass doors cleaned inside and outside Vacuum furniture Tables and chairs cleaned Floors vacuumed Floors swept and mopped Wipe down appliance exteriors KITCHEN TASKS: Clean sinks and countertops Clean backsplash Clean outlets Clean light switches Microwave cleaned inside and outside Clean stovetop and hood Cabinets cleaned (exterior) BATHROOM TASKS: Clean sinks and countertops Bathtubs cleaned Showers cleaned Sink and vanity exterior cleaned Mirrors cleaned
